title: Add releaseStability typed-enum field to AIModelFamily entry
description: Distinct from `substrateDeploymentStatus` (substrate's roadmap state), `releaseStability` tracks the PROVIDER's own release-stability claim for the family. Substrate forms depend on this when choosing whether to bet on a family for production. Proposed enum cases: `experimental` (provider explicitly labels as research / preview / beta), `preview` (broad availability but provider may break compatibility), `stable` (provider commits to API stability), `deprecated` (provider has announced retirement). Populate per-family: Apple Foundation `stable`; Claude 3.5+ `stable`; Gemini 2.5 `stable`; GPT-5 `stable`; Mercury `experimental`; Llama 4 `stable`; Mistral `stable`; DeepSeek-R1 `preview` (rapidly evolving); Grok-3 `preview`; Phi `stable`; Qwen `stable`; Cohere `stable`; Nova `stable`. Add enum file alongside other capability enums. Update tests.
